mapper.select:
SELECT DISTINCT m.id, m.parent_id, m.menu_name, m.menu_type, m.path, m.component, m.perms, m.icon, m.sort, m.visible, m.status, m.create_by, m.create_time, m.update_by, m.update_time FROM sys_menu m
m.status = 1 AND m.menu_type IN (1, 2)
AND m.id IN ( SELECT rm.menu_id FROM sys_role_menu rm INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON rm.role_id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} )
ORDER BY m.parent_id, m.sort
